name: Orientrose Contracts
message: Orientrose Contracts (founded 2004)  are a specialist building contractor to the leisure and commercial sector, working with clients in the pub, restaurant, hotel & club sector. Orientrose Contracts corporate office is located in 6 Vantage Park Washingley Rd Unit, Huntingdon, United Kingdom and has 11 employees. The total amount of data leakage is 230.0 GB
